creator: tnt@home.se
text:
I did cvsup of ports-all a few days ago.
Failed to install printer/apsfilter from the
ports collection. (Should have included the output
from make here if I had the machine in front of me)
Let me know if the it isn't repeatable and I can supply
an output later.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/print/apsfilter
make
